user.title: Connect to MCZ Maestro Stove
user.description: Enter the serial number and MAC address of your MCZ stove. You can find these in the MCZ Maestro app under stove settings.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to MCZ Cloud. Please verify your serial number and MAC address.
error.invalid_serial: Serial number must contain only digits.
error.invalid_mac: MAC address must be in XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX format.
